title: Evaluate Agentish Quality
expectation: Keep this process read-only: do not edit the shared checkout, a worktree, or a worker checkout while evaluating. Classify one target Agentish file, load only the Agentish quality-evaluation blueprint plus the minimum allowed companion context for that file class, evaluate the file in fresh context, and produce a structured report that separates writing quality from corpus-role or obsolescence concerns.
idlePrompt: If the Agentish quality evaluation is complete, reply only with 'done: agentish quality evaluated'. If you are truly blocked on missing target-file or companion-context information, reply only with 'blocked: agentish quality evaluation requires clarification'. Otherwise resume the evaluation immediately and produce the next file judgment instead of giving only a status update.
blockedToken: blocked: agentish quality evaluation requires clarification
